data.title: Create test-tag-cli-refactor.sh with RED structural tests
data.description: Create tests/scripts/test-tag-cli-refactor.sh with 5 structural grep-based tests (fail RED before Task 4): test_brainstorm_skill_no_ticket_edit_tags, test_roadmap_skill_no_ticket_edit_tags, test_ui_designer_dispatch_no_ticket_edit_tags, test_interaction_deferred_contract_updated, test_preplanning_skill_table_updated. Plus 1 E2E smoke test (passes immediately, includes dispatcher skip guard). Update .test-index with 5 RED markers + 1 source mapping for ticket-lib.sh.
